perks.name: Ageless
perks.description: Immune to aging and to supernatural effects that cause aging.

perks.name: Artisan
perks.description: Masters a specific craft, gaining Advantage 1 on related tasks.

perks.name: Ascetic
perks.description: Advantage 1 against deprivation of food, water, or companionship.

perks.name: Attractive
perks.description: Advantage 1 in social situations where physical appearance matters.

perks.name: Brute
perks.description: Once per session, uses Might in place of Persuasion by flexing sheer physical force.

perks.name: Courageous
perks.description: Once per session, shrugs off all negative effects from fear or low morale.

perks.name: Crowd Favorite
perks.description: Always finds work in taverns and inns thanks to a knack for performing.

perks.name: Disease Immunity
perks.description: Immune to natural diseases (though not to supernatural curses).

perks.name: Divine Agent
perks.description: Once per session, automatically survives a fatal blow at 1 HP.

perks.name: Divine Insight
perks.description: Once per session, gains supernatural insight into a relevant matter.

perks.name: Ear of the Emperor
perks.description: Can call on a highly placed contact for one major favor per campaign.

perks.name: Extraordinary Presence
perks.description: An otherworldly nature shows plainly, granting Advantage 1 in relevant social situations.

perks.name: Fugitive
perks.description: Once per session, calls in a favor from contacts in the criminal underworld.

perks.name: Idol
perks.description: Once per session, leverages a saintly reputation to inspire trust.

perks.name: Innocent
perks.description: Once per session, plays on their innocence to win an enemy's mercy.

perks.name: Jack of All Trades
perks.description: Once per session, automatically succeeds on a craft check of DC 14 or lower.

perks.name: Legendary Bloodline
perks.description: A prestigious lineage earns them deference and access within a chosen field.

perks.name: Local Hero
perks.description: Ordinary folk of their home region offer food, shelter, and small favors.

perks.name: Lucky
perks.description: Once per session, luck steps in unexpectedly on their behalf.

perks.name: Merchant
perks.description: Can never be swindled in a trade and always knows a fair price.

perks.name: Nature's Ally
perks.description: Wild animals and nature-bound folk react favorably to their presence.

perks.name: Observant
perks.description: Once per session, notices hidden details everyone else missed.

perks.name: Profession
perks.description: Masters a specific trade, gaining Advantage 1 on non-combat checks related to it.

perks.name: Pure-hearted
perks.description: Benevolent creatures treat them one notch friendlier than usual.

perks.name: Resilient
perks.description: Once per session, automatically succeeds on a Fortitude check of DC 10 + 2x their score or lower.

perks.name: Scavenger
perks.description: Once per session, easily scrounges up an ordinary item even where none should be available.

perks.name: Scent
perks.description: Smells out living creatures within 18 meters and gets Advantage 1 when tracking.

perks.name: Scholar
perks.description: Once per session, retries a failed Learning check with Advantage 2.

perks.name: Silver Tongue
perks.description: Once per session, pries loose a useful secret after five minutes of conversation.

perks.name: Stone Sense
perks.description: Underground, can never get lost and gains Advantage 1 on relevant checks.

perks.name: Street Rat
perks.description: Advantage 1 on checks involving city navigation, stealth, street survival, and rumors.

perks.name: Upper Class
perks.description: Commoners trust them on sight, and authorities presume their innocence.

perks.name: Vagabond
perks.description: Always knows which way is north and can always scrounge up food for themselves and their allies.

perks.name: Warrior's Code
perks.description: Once per session, invokes an unspoken warrior's code to earn favorable treatment from enemies.

perks.name: Whisperer of the Wild
perks.description: Once per session, asks a plant or animal a yes/no question and gets a truthful answer.

flaws.name: Absent-minded
flaws.description: Slow to notice important details and easily distracted at crucial moments.

flaws.name: Addiction
flaws.description: An irresistible craving drives them to reckless or terrible lengths to get their fix.

flaws.name: Ambitious
flaws.description: Tramples over others to get ahead, sometimes going so far as to endanger their own allies.

flaws.name: Bloodlust
flaws.description: Sees violence as the answer to everything, picking fights or dragging them out needlessly.

flaws.name: Brash
flaws.description: Recklessly bold, allergic to planning or strategic thinking.

flaws.name: Bravado
flaws.description: Pulls off dramatic, daring stunts purely for the thrill of it.

flaws.name: Cosmetic Deformity
flaws.description: An unattractive or off-putting appearance that works against them in social situations.

flaws.name: Compulsion
flaws.description: An irresistible urge to perform some behavior, prone to creating awkward situations.

flaws.name: Cowardly
flaws.description: Puts self-preservation first and spooks easily, steering clear of danger and injury.

flaws.name: Dimwitted
flaws.description: A slow learner who struggles to remember anything outside their own field of expertise.

flaws.name: Disabled
flaws.description: A physical impairment holds them back in daily life, in ways depending on its nature.

flaws.name: Greedy
flaws.description: A hunger for wealth drives them to take reckless risks and even betray allies for profit.

flaws.name: Honest
flaws.description: Refuses to lie or deceive, even to save their own life or someone else's.

flaws.name: Hot Tempered
flaws.description: Their temper flares destructively, causing trouble whenever they lose control.

flaws.name: Illiterate
flaws.description: Cannot read or write in any language they speak.

flaws.name: Literal Minded
flaws.description: Struggles with idioms and metaphors, taking everything at face value.

flaws.name: Mood Disorder
flaws.description: A psychological condition, such as depression or anxiety, directly affects their mood.

flaws.name: Naive
flaws.description: Gullible due to innocence, inexperience, or a plain lack of knowledge.

flaws.name: Overt
flaws.description: Scorns subterfuge and deception, sometimes blowing their allies' carefully laid plans.

flaws.name: Overweight
flaws.description: Excess weight gets in the way during physical tasks like climbing or balancing.

flaws.name: Pacifist
flaws.description: Avoids combat and bloodshed, seeking alternatives even in self-defense.

flaws.name: Phobia
flaws.description: Sheer terror of a specific object or situation leaves them unable to think straight.

flaws.name: Proud
flaws.description: A swollen ego leads them to look down on others and brag about their own superiority.

flaws.name: Psychotic
flaws.description: Occasionally loses touch with reality, triggered by specific mental disturbances.

flaws.name: Short-winded
flaws.description: Weak lung capacity makes sprints and forced marches a struggle.

flaws.name: Sick
flaws.description: A chronic illness triggers flare-ups or episodes that get in the way of adventuring.

flaws.name: Socially Awkward
flaws.description: Their manner tends to rub people the wrong way in social situations.

flaws.name: Stubborn
flaws.description: Once their mind is made up on something important, refuses to budge or compromise.

flaws.name: Uncoordinated
flaws.description: Struggles with balance, catching objects, and any physical task requiring dexterity.

flaws.name: Vengeful
flaws.description: Never lets a slight go unpunished, relentlessly pursuing proportionate revenge.

flaws.name: Zealous
flaws.description: Devotion to a cause drives them to extreme acts that defy convention.
